title: Translate vetted heat-illness prevention guidance into French
context: Community health workers need vetted heat-illness prevention guidance in French. Use a vetted public-health source (e.g. WHO/MoH); verify the source licence permits translation/derivatives and record it — do NOT assume CC-BY. Include the required source attribution and any mandated translation disclaimer.
objective: Produce an accurate French translation of vetted heat-illness prevention guidance, preserving medical terminology.
acceptanceCriteria: Reviewed by a qualified French-speaking reviewer (risk-tier: medium)
Source licence verified to permit translation + attribution/disclaimer recorded (not relicensed as CC-BY unless the source allows)
